rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Tuesday, April 14, 2015, line 1. Defendant Chicago Title Company's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 6th causes of action. Plaintiff already settled with sellers. The 3rd and 5th causes of action are against Page only. The Complaint is dismissed in its entirety. Motion to Strike is DENIED as moot. = (501/REQ)
